NAVAREA XIX 63/21
 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 311830 UTC MAY 21
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
 72-38.6N 034-50.5E DEEPSEA NORDKAPP
 72-27.0N 020-09.0E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 65-44.0N 007-39.0E DEEPSEA STAVANGER
 65-07.1N 006-40.3E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
 NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE
 SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N. REFER TO 
 NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT 
 WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 44/21
